Package io.forja.components.dataDisplay.fxTree

Class FxTree.Builder<T>

java.lang.Object
io.forja.builder.FxComponentBuilder<FxTree<T>,FxTree.Builder<T>>
io.forja.components.dataDisplay.fxTree.FxTree.Builder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - item type
Enclosing class:
FxTree<T>
public static class FxTree.Builder<T> extends FxComponentBuilder<FxTree<T>,FxTree.Builder<T>>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTree.

Defaults:

  • root — null
  • showRoot — true
  • selectionMode — SelectionMode.SINGLE
  • editable — false

    • build

      public FxTree<T> build()
      Description copied from class: FxComponentBuilder
      Constructs and returns the configured component.

      Implementations must call FxComponentBuilder.applyBase(Control) on the constructed control before returning it.

      Specified by:
      build in class FxComponentBuilder<FxTree<T>,FxTree.Builder<T>>
      Returns:
      the built component
